mission.title: linkerd: Viz - blank page on loading any of the tools
mission.description: Viz - blank page on loading any of the tools. This issue affects 14+ users.

steps.title: Identify linkerd troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your linkerd deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n linkerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd -n linkerd --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review linkerd configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant linkerd configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n linkerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd
kubectl get configmap -n linkerd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=linkerd
```
### What is the issue?

If I select any of the Tap / Top / Routes options from the Viz dashboard, I get a blank white page:

Another user on Slack confirmed they also have this issue

steps.title: Apply the fix for Viz - blank page on loading any of the tools
steps.description:
I'm facing the same problem with 2.12.0. I see errors in the Prometheus logs though when clicking on `Tap` in the dashboard.

```
INFO ThreadId(01) inbound:server{port=9090}: linkerd_app_inbound: Connection denied server.group=policy.linkerd.io server.kind=server server.name=admin

steps.title: Confirm Viz - blank page on loading any of the tools is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd -n linkerd --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n linkerd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary: I'm facing the same problem with 2.12.0. I see errors in the Prometheus logs though when clicking on `Tap` in the dashboard.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with linkerd installed or the issue environment reproducible.
